recommendations.title: Boris: The Film
recommendations.overview: A director and his crew attempt to make the transition from the small to the big screen.
recommendations.director: Luca Vendruscolo, Giacomo Ciarrapico, Mattia Torre

recommendations.title: Repo Man
recommendations.overview: A down and out young punk gets a job working with a seasoned repo man, but what awaits him in his new career is a series of outlandish adventures revolving around aliens, the CIA, and a most wanted '64 Chevy.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Nerds IV: Nerds in Love

recommendations.title: My First Time
recommendations.overview: Zachary is 20 years old. Dark and independent, he collects amorous conquests and school failure. Sarah is 18 years old. First class, fragile, she fills her emotional gaps with perfect control of his life. Nothing should close and yet, the year of the

recommendations.title: Force of Evil
recommendations.overview: Lawyer Joe Morse wants to consolidate all the small-time numbers racket operators into one big powerful operation. But his elder brother Leo is one of these small-time operators who wants to stay that way, preferring not to deal with the gangsters wh

recommendations.title: The First Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, who's hitting the big 3-0, brings a surprise guest to meet the family. A Christmas special so wrong it must be from comedians Porta dos Fundos.

recommendations.title: Collateral
recommendations.overview: Cab driver Max picks up a man who offers him $600 to drive him around. But the promise of easy money sours when Max realizes his fare is an assassin.

recommendations.title: Slam
recommendations.overview: Samuele is 16 and has a passion for skateboarding. He has big dreams: going to university, move to California, and travel, but things change when he meets Alice, who could be the girl of his life.

recommendations.title: Meus 15 Anos: Filme
recommendations.overview: A shy student suddenly becomes the center of attention when she wins a huge birthday party that she never asked for.
